name: PRC_ETICARET_SATIS_TAKIP
definition:
CREATE VIEW PRC_ETICARET_SATIS_TAKIP AS

WITH SalesData AS (SELECT        'RESTAR' AS FIRMA, YEAR(F.DATE_) AS YIL, MONTH(F.DATE_) AS AY, F.DATE_ AS TARIH, F.FICHENO AS FATURA_NO, C.CODE AS CARI_KODU, C.DEFINITION_ AS CARI_ADI, REPLACE(S.CODE, '-01', '') 
                                                                      AS STOK_KODU, S.NAME AS STOK_ADI, CASE F.TRCODE WHEN 3 THEN L.AMOUNT * - 1 WHEN 2 THEN L.AMOUNT * - 1 ELSE L.AMOUNT END AS MIKTAR, 
                                                                      CASE F.TRCODE WHEN 3 THEN L.PRICE * - 1 WHEN 2 THEN (L.PRICE / (1 + L.VAT / 100)) * - 1 WHEN 7 THEN (L.PRICE / (1 + L.VAT / 100)) ELSE L.PRICE END AS FIYAT, 
                                                                      CASE F.TRCODE WHEN 3 THEN L.VATAMNT * - 1 WHEN 2 THEN L.VATAMNT * - 1 ELSE L.VATAMNT END AS KDV, 
                                                                      CAST(CASE F.TRCODE WHEN 3 THEN CASE WHEN L.TRCODE = 7 THEN (L.TOTAL / (1 + L.VAT / 100)) - L.DISTCOST ELSE (L.TOTAL) - (L.DISTCOST) 
                                                                      END * - 1 WHEN 2 THEN CASE WHEN L.TRCODE = 7 THEN (L.TOTAL / (1 + L.VAT / 100)) - L.DISTCOST ELSE (L.TOTAL / (1 + L.VAT / 100)) 
                                                                      - L.DISTCOST END * - 1 ELSE CASE WHEN L.TRCODE = 7 THEN (L.TOTAL / (1 + L.VAT / 100)) - L.DISTCOST ELSE (L.TOTAL) - (L.DISTCOST) END END AS DECIMAL(15, 2)) AS TUTAR, 
                                                                      CAST(CASE F.TRCODE WHEN 3 THEN CASE WHEN L.TRCODE = 7 THEN ((L.TOTAL / (1 + L.VAT / 100)) - L.DISTCOST) + L.VATAMNT ELSE ((L.TOTAL) - (L.DISTCOST)) 
                                                                      + L.VATAMNT END * - 1 WHEN 2 THEN CASE WHEN L.TRCODE = 7 THEN ((L.TOTAL / (1 + L.VAT / 100)) - L.DISTCOST) + L.VATAMNT ELSE ((L.TOTAL / (1 + L.VAT / 100)) - L.DISTCOST) 
                                                                      + L.VATAMNT END * - 1 ELSE CASE WHEN L.TRCODE = 7 THEN ((L.TOTAL / (1 + L.VAT / 100)) - L.DISTCOST) + L.VATAMNT ELSE ((L.TOTAL) - (L.DISTCOST)) + L.VATAMNT END END AS DECIMAL(15, 2)) 
                                                                      AS NET_TUTAR, CAST(L.OUTCOST AS DECIMAL(15, 3)) AS MALIYET, ISNULL
                                                                          ((SELECT        DEFINITION_
                                                                              FROM            dbo.LG_123_SPECODES WITH (NOLOCK)
                                                                              WHERE        (SPECODETYPE = 25) AND (SPECODE = L.SPECODE)), '') AS TUR, D_EXC_EUR.RATES1 AS EUR_KUR, CASE WHEN ISNULL(D_EXC_EUR.RATES1, 0) 
                                                                      = 0 THEN 0 ELSE ((CASE F.TRCODE WHEN 3 THEN L.PRICE * - 1 ELSE L.PRICE END) / D_EXC_EUR.RATES1) END AS FIYAT_EUR, CASE WHEN ISNULL(D_EXC_EUR.RATES1, 0) 
                                                                      = 0 THEN 0 ELSE ((CASE L.DISTCOST WHEN 0 THEN CASE F.TRCODE WHEN 3 THEN L.VATAMNT * - 1 ELSE L.VATAMNT END ELSE 0 END) / D_EXC_EUR.RATES1) END AS KDV_EUR, 
                                                                      CASE WHEN ISNULL(D_EXC_EUR.RATES1, 0) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE ((CASE F.TRCODE WHEN 3 THEN CASE WHEN L.TRCODE = 7 THEN (L.TOTAL - L.VATAMNT) - (L.DISTCOST) ELSE (L.TOTAL) - (L.DISTCOST) 
                                                                      END * - 1 ELSE CASE WHEN L.TRCODE = 7 THEN (L.TOTAL - L.VATAMNT) - (L.DISTCOST) ELSE (L.TOTAL) - (L.DISTCOST) END END) / D_EXC_EUR.RATES1) END AS TUTAR_EUR, ISNULL
                                                                          ((SELECT        DISCPER
                                                                              FROM            dbo.LG_123_01_STLINE AS S WITH (NOLOCK)
                                                                              WHERE        (LINETYPE = 2) AND (INVOICEREF = F.LOGICALREF) AND (DISCPER > 0) AND (PARENTLNREF = L.LOGICALREF)), 0) AS [S INDIRIM ORANI], ISNULL
                                                                          ((SELECT        DISCPER
                                                                              FROM            dbo.LG_123_01_STLINE AS S WITH (NOLOCK)
                                                                              WHERE        (LINETYPE = 2) AND (INVOICEREF = F.LOGICALREF) AND (DISCPER > 0) AND (PARENTLNREF = 0)), 0) AS [G INDIRIM ORANI], ISNULL
                                                                          ((SELECT        TOTAL / (INVOICELNNO - 1) AS Expr1
                                                                              FROM            dbo.LG_123_01_STLINE AS S WITH (NOLOCK)
                                                                              WHERE        (LINETYPE = 3) AND (INVOICEREF = F.LOGICALREF) AND (DISCPER > 0)), 0) AS [MASRAF TUTARI], 
                                                                      CASE WHEN L.TRCODE = 03 THEN 'TOPTAN SATIŞ İADELERİ' WHEN L.TRCODE = 02 THEN 'PERAKENDE SATIŞ İADELERİ' WHEN L.TRCODE = 14 THEN 'FİYAT FARKI' ELSE 'ETİCARET SATIŞLAR' END AS FIS_TURU,
                                                                       CASE WHEN C.CODE IN ('127.İBRAHİM', '127.SİNEM', '127.KADİRY', '127.ERSEL', '127.EMREÖ', '127.KERİM', '127.ONUR', '127.MUHARREM', '127.DERYA', '127.SABRİ', '127.KEREMT', '127.UMUT', 
                                                                      '127.ALPER', '127.GÖKHAN', '127.ELVAN') THEN 'N11' WHEN C.CODE IN ('127.WOLVES', '127.SERKAN', '127.MEHMETD', '127.SERKANG', '127.EMRED') 
                                                                      THEN 'SHOWROOM-FUAR-AKTİVİTE' WHEN C.CODE = '127.SİNAN' THEN 'ŞİRKET İÇİ' WHEN C.CODE IN ('127.DİLHAN', '127.RABİA', '127.TAYLAN', '127.BEYZAÖ', '127.EMRAHD', '127.MARİNA', 
                                                                      '127.ABDULA', '127.SALAHAD', '127.BENGİ', '127.BÜLENT', '127.VİLYAM', '127.AHMEDS', '127.ŞÜKRAN', '127.ALPERD', '127.SELÇUK', '127.DERYAT', '127.İPEK', '127.SEVAL', '127.VOLKAN', '127.SELMİN', 
                                                                      '127.MAHMUT', '127.ŞERİF', '127.NURŞEDA', '127.YAŞARK', '127.MEHMETÇ', '127.FATMAY', '127.MEHMETO', '127.MİHAL', '127.ALİ', '127.ZAFER', '127.MEHMETŞ') 
                                                                      THEN 'TRENDYOL' WHEN C.CODE IN ('127.NAZLI', '127.CEM', '127.ENİS', '127.ONURÇ', '127.MUSTAFAA', '127.OĞUZ', '127.YETKİN', '127.FERHAT', '127.ÖMER', '127.ASLI', '127.BİRCE', '127.SIDDIK', 
                                                                      '127.RECEP', '127.MERT', '127.TURGAY', '127.BERKTAN', '127.ERDİNÇ', '127.MONREC', '127.BESİM', '127.ÜMİT', '127.ORKUN', '127.OYTUN', '127.REFİK') 
                                                                      THEN 'URBANBADGER.COM.TR' WHEN C.CODE IN ('127.HUBAUER', '120.DDHH- EU') THEN 'YURTDIŞI KARAVAN MÜŞTERİLERİ' WHEN C.CODE IN ('127.AHMET', '127.ANDREİ', '127.ANIL', '127.ARDAK', 
                                                                      '127.ARDAS', '127.ARZU', '127.AYDIN', '127.AYŞE', '127.AYTUĞ', '127.BETÜL', '127.BİLGEHAN', '127.BİRCAN', '127.CANER', '127.CEVAT', '127.DİDEM', '127.DUYGU', '127.EMRAH', '127.EMRE', 
                                                                      '127.ERDEM', '127.ESRAÖ', '127.FATMA', '127.FETHİ', '127.FETHİYE', '127.FUAT', '127.GONCA', '127.HALİL', '127.HAZAR', '127.İRFAN', '127.İSMAİL', '127.İSMAYİL', '127.KADİR', '127.MAHİR', 
                                                                      '127.MAKHAM', '127.MEHMET', '127.MEHMETC', '127.MEHMETP', '127.MEHMETS', '127.NİHAL', '127.MUHAMMED', '127.MUSTAFA', '127.MÜGE', '127.ÖZLEM', '127.PINAR', '127.REŞİT', '127.SALİH', 
                                                                      '127.SEDAT', '127.SELMA', '127.SERDAL', '127.TARIK', '127.TUĞBA', '127.TUĞCE', '127.TURGAYA', '127.ULUKAN', '127.VİLMAM', '127.YASEMİN', '127.YAŞAR', '127.YASİN', '127.ZEKİ', '127.ZÜLEYHA', 
                                                                      '127.TUĞÇE') 
                                                                      THEN 'TRENDYOL' WHEN C.CODE = '120.FORD' THEN 'BAYİ SATIŞ' WHEN C.CODE LIKE '120.AMAZO%' THEN 'AMAZON' WHEN C.CODE LIKE '120.MUHT%' THEN 'SHOWROOM-FUAR-AKTİVİTE' WHEN C.CODE
                                                                       LIKE '127.TCMX%' THEN 'URBANBADGER.COM.TR' WHEN C.CODE LIKE '127.N11%' THEN 'N11' WHEN C.SPECODE = 'HB' THEN 'HEPSİBURADA' WHEN C.CODE LIKE '127.TRNDY%' THEN 'TRENDYOL' WHEN
                                                                       C.CODE LIKE '127.BYMN%' OR
                                                                      C.CODE IN ('BYMN1', 'BYMN2', 'BYMN3') THEN 'BEYMEN' WHEN C.CODE LIKE '127.KCTK%' OR
                                                                      C.CODE IN ('127.K1', '127.K2', '127.K2-01', '127.K3', '127.K3-1', '127.K4', '127.K5', '127.K6', '127.K7', '127.K8') 
                                                                      THEN 'KOÇTAŞ' WHEN C.CODE LIKE '196.%' THEN 'ŞİRKET İÇİ' WHEN C.CODE = '12050.HOTOM EU' THEN 'HOTOMOBIL' WHEN C.CODE LIKE '12050.%' THEN 'YURTDIŞI KARAVAN MÜŞTERİLERİ' WHEN C.CODE
                                                                       IN ('120.DİNÇER', '120.MURAT', '120.ALİB', '127.ŞEVKET', '127.MELEKP', '127.PINAR', '127.DİDEM', '120.ZEYNEP', '120.YAMAÇ', '127.SELMAB') 
                                                                      THEN 'ŞİRKET İÇİ' WHEN C.CODE LIKE '120.HÜSEYİNA' THEN 'SATINALMA TOPTAN SATIŞ' WHEN C.CODE LIKE '127.ORÇUN' THEN 'BAYİ SATIŞ' WHEN C.CODE LIKE '120.%' THEN 'YURTİÇİ KARAVAN MÜŞTERİLERİ'
                                                                       WHEN C.CODE LIKE '320.%' THEN 'TEDARİKÇİ' WHEN C.CODE LIKE '127.HB%' THEN 'HEPSİBURADA' ELSE 'DİĞER PAZARYERİ SATIŞLARI' END AS SATIŞ_KANALI
                                             FROM            dbo.LG_123_01_STLINE AS L WITH (NOLOCK) INNER JOIN
                                                                      dbo.LG_123_ITEMS AS S WITH (NOLOCK) ON S.LOGICALREF = L.STOCKREF INNER JOIN
                                                                      dbo.LG_123_01_INVOICE AS F WITH (NOLOCK) ON F.LOGICALREF = L.INVOICEREF INNER JOIN
                                                                      dbo.LG_123_CLCARD AS C WITH (NOLOCK) ON C.LOGICALREF = F.CLIENTREF LEFT OUTER JOIN
                                                                      dbo.LG_123_EMUHACC AS EMU WITH (NOLOCK) ON EMU.LOGICALREF = L.ACCOUNTREF LEFT OUTER JOIN
                                                                      dbo.LG_EXCHANGE_123 AS D_EXC WITH (NOLOCK) ON D_EXC.CRTYPE = 1 AND D_EXC.EDATE = L.DATE_ LEFT OUTER JOIN
                                                                      dbo.LG_EXCHANGE_123 AS D_EXC_EUR WITH (NOLOCK) ON D_EXC_EUR.CRTYPE = 20 AND D_EXC_EUR.EDATE = L.DATE_
                                             WHERE   D_EXC_EUR.RATES1<>0 AND  D_EXC.RATES1<>0 AND L.VAT <>0 AND L.VATAMNT<>0 AND(L.LINETYPE = 0) AND (F.TRCODE IN (8, 9, 7, 3, 2, 14)) AND (F.CANCELLED = 0) AND (YEAR(F.DATE_) > 2021) AND
                                                                          ((SELECT        STGRPCODE
                                                                              FROM            dbo.LG_123_ITEMS
                                                                              WHERE        (CODE = S.CODE)) = 'ETİCARET') AND (C.CODE <> '120.RETECH - EUR')
                                             UNION ALL
                                             SELECT        'RETECH' AS FIRMA, YEAR(F.DATE_) AS YIL, MONTH(F.DATE_) AS AY, F.DATE_ AS TARIH, F.FICHENO AS FATURA_NO, C.CODE AS CARI_KODU, C.DEFINITION_ AS CARI_ADI, REPLACE(S.CODE, '153-', '') 
                                                                      AS STOK_KODU, S.NAME AS STOK_ADI, CASE F.TRCODE WHEN 3 THEN L.AMOUNT * - 1 WHEN 2 THEN L.AMOUNT * - 1 ELSE L.AMOUNT END AS MIKTAR, 
                                                                      CASE F.TRCODE WHEN 3 THEN L.PRICE * - 1 WHEN 2 THEN (L.PRICE / (1 + L.VAT / 100)) * - 1 WHEN 7 THEN (L.PRICE / (1 + L.VAT / 100)) ELSE L.PRICE END AS FIYAT, 
                                                                      CASE F.TRCODE WHEN 3 THEN L.VATAMNT * - 1 WHEN 2 THEN L.VATAMNT * - 1 ELSE L.VATAMNT END AS KDV, 
                                                                      CAST(CASE F.TRCODE WHEN 3 THEN CASE WHEN L.TRCODE = 7 THEN (L.TOTAL / (1 + L.VAT / 100)) - L.DISTCOST ELSE (L.TOTAL) - (L.DISTCOST) 
                                                                      END * - 1 WHEN 2 THEN CASE WHEN L.TRCODE = 7 THEN (L.TOTAL / (1 + L.VAT / 100)) - L.DISTCOST ELSE (L.TOTAL / (1 + L.VAT / 100)) 
                                                                      - L.DISTCOST END * - 1 ELSE CASE WHEN L.TRCODE = 7 THEN (L.TOTAL / (1 + L.VAT / 100)) - L.DISTCOST ELSE (L.TOTAL) - (L.DISTCOST) END END AS DECIMAL(15, 2)) AS TUTAR, 
                                                                      CAST(CASE F.TRCODE WHEN 3 THEN CASE WHEN L.TRCODE = 7 THEN ((L.TOTAL / (1 + L.VAT / 100)) - L.DISTCOST) + L.VATAMNT ELSE ((L.TOTAL) - (L.DISTCOST)) 
                                                                      + L.VATAMNT END * - 1 WHEN 2 THEN CASE WHEN L.TRCODE = 7 THEN ((L.TOTAL / (1 + L.VAT / 100)) - L.DISTCOST) + L.VATAMNT ELSE ((L.TOTAL / (1 + L.VAT / 100)) - L.DISTCOST) 
                                                                      + L.VATAMNT END * - 1 ELSE CASE WHEN L.TRCODE = 7 THEN ((L.TOTAL / (1 + L.VAT / 100)) - L.DISTCOST) + L.VATAMNT ELSE ((L.TOTAL) - (L.DISTCOST)) + L.VATAMNT END END AS DECIMAL(15, 2)) 
                                                                      AS NET_TUTAR, CAST(L.OUTCOST AS DECIMAL(15, 3)) AS MALIYET, ISNULL
                                                                          ((SELECT        DEFINITION_
                                                                              FROM            dbo.LG_223_SPECODES WITH (NOLOCK)
                                                                              WHERE        (SPECODETYPE = 25) AND (SPECODE = L.SPECODE)), '') AS TUR, D_EXC_EUR.RATES1 AS EUR_KUR, CASE WHEN ISNULL(D_EXC_EUR.RATES1, 0) 
                                                                      = 0 THEN 0 ELSE ((CASE F.TRCODE WHEN 3 THEN L.PRICE * - 1 ELSE L.PRICE END) / D_EXC_EUR.RATES1) END AS FIYAT_EUR, CASE WHEN ISNULL(D_EXC_EUR.RATES1, 0) 
                                                                      = 0 THEN 0 ELSE ((CASE L.DISTCOST WHEN 0 THEN CASE F.TRCODE WHEN 3 THEN L.VATAMNT * - 1 ELSE L.VATAMNT END ELSE 0 END) / D_EXC_EUR.RATES1) END AS KDV_EUR, 
                                                                      CASE WHEN ISNULL(D_EXC_EUR.RATES1, 0) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE ((CASE F.TRCODE WHEN 3 THEN CASE WHEN L.TRCODE = 7 THEN (L.TOTAL - L.VATAMNT) - (L.DISTCOST) ELSE (L.TOTAL) - (L.DISTCOST) 
                                                                      END * - 1 ELSE CASE WHEN L.TRCODE = 7 THEN (L.TOTAL - L.VATAMNT) - (L.DISTCOST) ELSE (L.TOTAL) - (L.DISTCOST) END END) / D_EXC_EUR.RATES1) END AS TUTAR_EUR, ISNULL
                                                                          ((SELECT        DISCPER
                                                                              FROM            dbo.LG_223_01_STLINE AS S WITH (NOLOCK)
                                                                              WHERE        (LINETYPE = 2) AND (INVOICEREF = F.LOGICALREF) AND (DISCPER > 0) AND (PARENTLNREF = L.LOGICALREF)), 0) AS [S INDIRIM ORANI], ISNULL
                                                                          ((SELECT        DISCPER
                                                                              FROM            dbo.LG_223_01_STLINE AS S WITH (NOLOCK)
                                                                              WHERE        (LINETYPE = 2) AND (INVOICEREF = F.LOGICALREF) AND (DISCPER > 0) AND (PARENTLNREF = 0)), 0) AS [G INDIRIM ORANI], ISNULL
                                                                          ((SELECT        TOTAL / (INVOICELNNO - 1) AS Expr1
                                                                              FROM            dbo.LG_223_01_STLINE AS S WITH (NOLOCK)
                                                                              WHERE        (LINETYPE = 3) AND (INVOICEREF = F.LOGICALREF) AND (DISCPER > 0)), 0) AS [MASRAF TUTARI], 
                                                                      CASE WHEN L.TRCODE = 03 THEN 'TOPTAN SATIŞ İADELERİ' WHEN L.TRCODE = 02 THEN 'PERAKENDE SATIŞ İADELERİ' WHEN L.TRCODE = 14 THEN 'FİYAT FARKI' ELSE 'ETİCARET SATIŞLAR' END AS FIS_TURU,
                                                                       CASE WHEN C.CODE IN ('127.İBRAHİM', '127.SİNEM', '127.KADİRY', '127.ERSEL', '127.EMREÖ', '127.KERİM', '127.ONUR', '127.MUHARREM', '127.DERYA', '127.SABRİ', '127.KEREMT', '127.UMUT', 
                                                                      '127.ALPER', '127.GÖKHAN', '127.ELVAN') THEN 'N11' WHEN C.CODE IN ('127.WOLVES', '127.SERKAN', '127.MEHMETD', '127.SERKANG', '127.EMRED') 
                                                                      THEN 'SHOWROOM-FUAR-AKTİVİTE' WHEN C.CODE = '127.SİNAN' THEN 'ŞİRKET İÇİ' WHEN C.CODE IN ('127.DİLHAN', '127.RABİA', '127.TAYLAN', '127.BEYZAÖ', '127.EMRAHD', '127.MARİNA', 
                                                                      '127.ABDULA', '127.SALAHAD', '127.BENGİ', '127.BÜLENT', '127.VİLYAM', '127.AHMEDS', '127.ŞÜKRAN', '127.ALPERD', '127.SELÇUK', '127.DERYAT', '127.İPEK', '127.SEVAL', '127.VOLKAN', '127.SELMİN', 
                                                                      '127.MAHMUT', '127.ŞERİF', '127.NURŞEDA', '127.YAŞARK', '127.MEHMETÇ', '127.FATMAY', '127.MEHMETO', '127.MİHAL', '127.ALİ', '127.ZAFER', '127.MEHMETŞ') 
                                                                      THEN 'TRENDYOL' WHEN C.CODE IN ('127.NAZLI', '127.CEM', '127.ENİS', '127.ONURÇ', '127.MUSTAFAA', '127.OĞUZ', '127.YETKİN', '127.FERHAT', '127.ÖMER', '127.ASLI', '127.BİRCE', '127.SIDDIK', 
                                                                      '127.RECEP', '127.MERT', '127.TURGAY', '127.BERKTAN', '127.ERDİNÇ', '127.MONREC', '127.BESİM', '127.ÜMİT', '127.ORKUN', '127.OYTUN', '127.REFİK') 
                                                                      THEN 'URBANBADGER.COM.TR' WHEN C.CODE IN ('127.HUBAUER', '120.DDHH- EU') THEN 'YURTDIŞI KARAVAN MÜŞTERİLERİ' WHEN C.CODE IN ('127.AHMET', '127.ANDREİ', '127.ANIL', '127.ARDAK', 
                                                                      '127.ARDAS', '127.ARZU', '127.AYDIN', '127.AYŞE', '127.AYTUĞ', '127.BETÜL', '127.BİLGEHAN', '127.BİRCAN', '127.CANER', '127.CEVAT', '127.DİDEM', '127.DUYGU', '127.EMRAH', '127.EMRE', 
                                                                      '127.ERDEM', '127.ESRAÖ', '127.FATMA', '127.FETHİ', '127.FETHİYE', '127.FUAT', '127.GONCA', '127.HALİL', '127.HAZAR', '127.İRFAN', '127.İSMAİL', '127.İSMAYİL', '127.KADİR', '127.MAHİR', 
                                                                      '127.MAKHAM', '127.MEHMET', '127.MEHMETC', '127.MEHMETP', '127.MEHMETS', '127.NİHAL', '127.MUHAMMED', '127.MUSTAFA', '127.MÜGE', '127.ÖZLEM', '127.PINAR', '127.REŞİT', '127.SALİH', 
                                                                      '127.SEDAT', '127.SELMA', '127.SERDAL', '127.TARIK', '127.TUĞBA', '127.TUĞCE', '127.TURGAYA', '127.ULUKAN', '127.VİLMAM', '127.YASEMİN', '127.YAŞAR', '127.YASİN', '127.ZEKİ', '127.ZÜLEYHA', 
                                                                      '127.TUĞÇE') 
                                                                      THEN 'TRENDYOL' WHEN C.CODE = '120.FORD' THEN 'BAYİ SATIŞ' WHEN C.CODE LIKE '120.AMAZO%' THEN 'AMAZON' WHEN C.CODE LIKE '120.MUHT%' THEN 'SHOWROOM-FUAR-AKTİVİTE' WHEN C.CODE
                                                                       LIKE '127.TCMX%' THEN 'URBANBADGER.COM.TR' WHEN C.CODE LIKE '127.N11%' THEN 'N11' WHEN C.SPECODE = 'HB' THEN 'HEPSİBURADA' WHEN C.CODE LIKE '127.TRNDY%' THEN 'TRENDYOL' WHEN
                                                                       C.CODE LIKE '127.BYMN%' OR
                                                                      C.CODE IN ('BYMN1', 'BYMN2', 'BYMN3') THEN 'BEYMEN' WHEN C.CODE LIKE '127.KCTK%' OR
                                                                      C.CODE IN ('127.K1', '127.K2', '127.K2-01', '127.K3', '127.K3-1', '127.K4', '127.K5', '127.K6', '127.K7', '127.K8') 
                                                                      THEN 'KOÇTAŞ' WHEN C.CODE LIKE '196.%' THEN 'ŞİRKET İÇİ' WHEN C.CODE = '12050.HOTOM EU' THEN 'HOTOMOBIL' WHEN C.CODE LIKE '12050.%' THEN 'YURTDIŞI KARAVAN MÜŞTERİLERİ' WHEN C.CODE
                                                                       IN ('120.DİNÇER', '120.MURAT', '120.ALİB', '127.ŞEVKET', '127.MELEKP', '127.PINAR', '127.DİDEM', '120.ZEYNEP', '120.YAMAÇ', '127.SELMAB') 
                                                                      THEN 'ŞİRKET İÇİ' WHEN C.CODE LIKE '120.HÜSEYİNA' THEN 'SATINALMA TOPTAN SATIŞ' WHEN C.CODE LIKE '127.ORÇUN' THEN 'BAYİ SATIŞ' WHEN C.CODE LIKE '120.%' THEN 'YURTİÇİ KARAVAN MÜŞTERİLERİ'
                                                                       WHEN C.CODE LIKE '320.%' THEN 'TEDARİKÇİ' WHEN C.CODE LIKE '127.HB%' THEN 'HEPSİBURADA' ELSE 'DİĞER PAZARYERİ SATIŞLARI' END AS SATIŞ_KANALI
                                             FROM            dbo.LG_223_01_STLINE AS L WITH (NOLOCK) INNER JOIN
                                                                      dbo.LG_223_ITEMS AS S WITH (NOLOCK) ON S.LOGICALREF = L.STOCKREF INNER JOIN
                                                                      dbo.LG_223_01_INVOICE AS F WITH (NOLOCK) ON F.LOGICALREF = L.INVOICEREF INNER JOIN
                                                                      dbo.LG_223_CLCARD AS C WITH (NOLOCK) ON C.LOGICALREF = F.CLIENTREF LEFT OUTER JOIN
                                                                      dbo.LG_223_EMUHACC AS EMU WITH (NOLOCK) ON EMU.LOGICALREF = L.ACCOUNTREF LEFT OUTER JOIN
                                                                      dbo.LG_EXCHANGE_123 AS D_EXC WITH (NOLOCK) ON D_EXC.CRTYPE = 1 AND D_EXC.EDATE = L.DATE_ LEFT OUTER JOIN
                                                                      dbo.LG_EXCHANGE_123 AS D_EXC_EUR WITH (NOLOCK) ON D_EXC_EUR.CRTYPE = 20 AND D_EXC_EUR.EDATE = L.DATE_
                                             WHERE    D_EXC_EUR.RATES1<>0 AND  D_EXC.RATES1<>0 AND L.VAT <>0 AND L.VATAMNT<>0 AND (L.LINETYPE = 0) AND (F.TRCODE IN (8, 9, 7, 3, 2, 14)) AND (F.CANCELLED = 0) AND (YEAR(F.DATE_) > 2021) AND
                                                                          ((SELECT        STGRPCODE
                                                                              FROM            dbo.LG_123_ITEMS
                                                                              WHERE        (CODE = REPLACE(S.CODE, '153-', ''))) = 'ETİCARET') AND (C.CODE <> '120.RETECH - EUR'))
    SELECT        FIRMA, YIL, AY, TARIH, FATURA_NO, CARI_KODU, CARI_ADI, STOK_KODU, STOK_ADI, MIKTAR, FIYAT, KDV, TUTAR, NET_TUTAR, MALIYET, TUR, EUR_KUR, FIYAT_EUR, KDV_EUR, TUTAR_EUR, [S INDIRIM ORANI], 
                              [G INDIRIM ORANI], [MASRAF TUTARI], FIS_TURU, CASE WHEN TUTAR BETWEEN - 1 AND 1 THEN 'BEDELSİZ' ELSE SATIŞ_KANALI END AS SATIŞ_KANALI
     FROM            SalesData

sample_data.CARI_ADI: COŞKUN YEDEK PARÇA OTOMOTİV İNŞAAT TAAHHÜT TİCARET LİMİTED ŞİRKETİ

sample_data.STOK_ADI: URBAN BADGER IKI KISILIK SISME YATAK
